apiKey.title: Job Market Intelligence API key
apiKey.description: Generate one at https://jobs.mujtaba0085.opior.com/auth/me/keys (needs the jobs:read scope). Kept secret, never shown in logs.

maxItems.title: Max results
maxItems.description: Stop after this many jobs. 0 = fetch everything available.

baseUrl.title: API base URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Job Market Intelligence site. Only change this if the site moves.
